entry.title: Re: How to call ATC in custom code?
entry.content: https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-and-automation-blog-posts/how-to-perform-an-atc-check-automatically-during-transport-task-release/ba-p/13202466

entry.title: Creating a document with change number though SAP ECTR Connector API - C#
entry.content:
I'm attempting to automate the creation of document records through the use of C# and the PLM_conn API. I have got the snippet below mostly working, but I'm getting an error message regarding a missing change number requirement. 

Any information or examples of how to supply the change number (DRAW-AENNR)  to the method to create the document would be much appreciated. 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/plm/3363506424.html

 public static void createMaster(IPlmConnector conn)
        {
            // Prepare template part
            string templateName = "C:\\temp\\20250508-sep_za065108_000.par";
            PlmRequestPartImpl templatePart = new PlmRequestPartImpl(templateName);
            // Prepare DocDefinition
            
            DocDefinition doc = new DocDefinition();
            doc.WithoutGui = true; // with or without showing document creation gui
            doc.DocDType = "SEP";
            doc.DocPart = "000";
            doc.DocNumber = "ROB-TEST1";
            doc.DocVersion = "00";
            doc.DocDescription = "CreateDocCTest";
                   
           

            // Prepare loaded parts
            PlmRequestPartList loadedParts = new PlmRequestPartList();
            // A: Creation without DocDefinition
            //IPlmResponse response = conn.CreateMaster( loadedParts, null, null );
            // B: Creation with DocDefinition 
            //IPlmResponse response = conn.CreateMaster( loadedParts, &Doc, null );
            // C: Creation without DocDefinition, with Template
            //IPlmResponse response = conn.CreateMaster(loadedParts, null, templatePart);
            // 😧 Creation with DocDefinition, with Template
           IPlmResponse response = conn.CreateMaster(loadedParts, doc, templatePart);
            // Evaluate response
            //evaluatePlmResponse(response);

            
        }

entry.title: Re: Custom MDK code for barcode reading logic is not work...
entry.content: Assuming I am understanding correctly that the camera scan on the zebra succeeds but he parsing does not, you will want to debug your rule to see why it is failing on the zebra then.

entry.title: How to compare two key figure values and copy in Data Action
entry.content:
Hello,

Users will enter the data at input page for two key figures Z_SALES1, Z_SALES2 along with other dimensions selections. The key figure Z_SALES1 value always higher than Z_SALES2 key figure for that dimension member combination, but sometimes user will enter Z_SALES1 lower values.

So, I am looking for the solution if users enter Z_SALES1 lower value compared to Z_SALES2, I would like to copy from Z_SALES2 values to Z_SALES1.

I tried the below code at Data Action but getting error –  “ No viable alternative at input ‘DATA’

IF DATA([d/Measures] = "Z_SALES1", [d/ZCCODE] = %CCODE_Input%) < DATA([d/Measures] = "Z_SALES2", [d/ZCCODE] = %CCODE_Input%) THEN

DATA([d/Measures] = "Z_SALES1", [d/ZCCODE] = %CCODE_Input%) =

RESULTLOOKUP([d/Version] = "public.Budget", [d/ZCCODE] = %CCODE_Input%,  [d/Measures] = "Z_SALES2")

ENDIF

How to fix the data action. How to achieve the required solution? Is the above problem statement, is it any other way to update except data action?

Regards,

Vasu

entry.title: Re: Vendor Report by IO Type and Clearing Date
entry.content: Thank you Jeremy for your reply. I have been using FBL1N, KOB1 & KOK5 to get the extracts and the do a v lookup in excel.

entry.title: how to set CPI Log Configuration to trace on for a single Iflow for only one scheduled run only
entry.content: I have a scheduled run at 6 am for a single interface that i want to have log configuration set to Trace, it will automatically default to info by the SAP Internal jobs, how do i enable this from code/configuration for ONLY this run.

entry.title: Re: How to find relevant batchjobs using variant input pa...
entry.content:
Hi @ali-sd ,

Please check the table TBTCP and/or logic of the report RSPC_DISPLAY_JOBS.

I could copy this report and rework accordingly to your needs. 

Or maybe develop a report to search for variants, using RS_VARIANT_CONTENTS or RS_VARIANT_VALUES_TECH_DATA and then apply for selection from TBTCP.

Hope this help.

BR, Dima

entry.title: Direct URL to open PO in SAP
entry.content:
Direct URL to open PO in SAP

We need to have a URL to display the PO number in ME23N by passing the PO number in URL.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Direct URL to open PO in SAP
entry.content:
Dear customer, 

Please, note that if the target mapping is well configured, you should be able to access the 

https://<yourURL>/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/ui2/ushell/shells/abap/FioriLaunchpad.html?saml2=disabled&sap-client=<yourClient>&sap-language=EN#PurchaseOrder-display?PurchaseOrder=<PONumber>

About how to maintain the right target mapping, please, check the following KBA: 

2766841 - Wrong document is displayed in the 'Display Purchase Order/Requisition/Contract - Advanced' app - SAP S/4HANA

In particular, please, make sure you have access to a target mapping PurchaseOrder-display configured with Transaction: MMPURPAMEPO and with parameter PurchaseOrder and target name P__EBELN. 

Anyway, in the KBA you have the transaction and parameters that you need to set. 

 

 Thanks and regards, 

 

Maria

SAP Technical Support

entry.title: Re: Difference in BPEG and BPGE tables in sap PS?
entry.content:
The main difference between the BPGE and BPEG tables in the context of budgeting in SAP lies in the level of detail of the information stored:

  • BPGE: Stores the overall budget, meaning the total planned amounts for controlling objects (such as WBS elements or orders). It acts as a summary or aggregator of the budget.
  • BPEG: Stores the detailed (line-item) released budget entries, meaning each individual posting that makes up the total amount recorded in BPGE. This allows you to track every single budget line entered for the project.

In summary: BPGE shows the consolidated total, while BPEG provides the details of each individual budget entry that makes up that total.

Regards
Marcio Blos

entry.title: Re: Error when trying to use "Run in parallel" within a S...
entry.content:
Hi @johnmurray,

I was facing the same issue but the strange part was out of 10 Sub Process's Input variables, only 2 variables were coming in the error and these 2 variables were marked as mandatory.

It worked for me by making the Input variables of the Sub Process as Non-mandatory.

Please try if that is the case for you as well.
Thanks & Regards,
Vishal Sharma

entry.title: Re: New Sandbox Available on the SAP Learning Site to Practice Hands-on
entry.content: Would I be able to create test users? @JenniferHauck

entry.title: Re: How do setup IAS login page for Onboardee and SSO pag...
entry.content:
If this is a strict requirement, and you can't find an alternative, what I would suggest is:

  • Create a separate subaccount for internal users.
  • Setup IAS to authenticate with Corporate IDP by default for this subaccount.
  • Deploy a simple Fiori/CAP application which redirects user to the SuccessFactors URL.

Internal users should then access the system through this link, instead of using the direct SuccessFactors URL.

IAS will automatically trigger SSO with Corporate IDP and they will be redirected to the SF URL. After this point, SF will redirect authentication request to the IAS and since the user is already authenticated, it will redirect back to the SF with successful login.

Let me know if the method is not clear on your side.

It is a dirty solution but if you don't have an alternative and this is something needs to be implemented, that would be an alternative.

entry.title: Re: Error when using "Run in parallel" within a SAP Build...
entry.content:
Hi Aqua ,

I was facing the same issue but the strange part was out of 10 Sub Process's Input variables, only 2 variables were coming in the error and these 2 variables were marked as mandatory.

It worked for me by making the Input variables of the Sub Process as Non-mandatory.

Please try if that is the case for you as well.
Thanks & Regards,
Vishal Sharma

entry.title: /DMO/FLIGHT maintain data public cloud system
entry.content:
Hi Team,

How to generate data in /DMO/FLIGHT. there is a report SAPBC_DATA_GENERATOR (SE38). but I'm using public cloud system. public cloud we don't have GUI access. is there any way to add the data into sflight table?

Thanks,

Nirojan.

entry.title: Re: Data Initialization Issue in CAP Java Project with HANA Database on Deployment
entry.content:
Update:

  • I tried adding empty .csv files and deleted all the data from the tables.
  • After adding a new field to a table and deploying, the data was cleared as expected.
  • I then reinserted data into the tables, deleted the .csv files, and redeployed. This time, the data was not cleared.
  • However, when I modified a table again and redeployed, the data was cleared.

    In the deployer logs, I found the following message:

    Inserted 0 records of the data source file "myCsv.csv" into the target table "MY_TABLE"

    It seems like the .csv file is being cached or retained somewhere, even though it has been deleted from the project

entry.title: Currently investigating on LMS API basic Integration using OAuth Token server
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am new to LMS API's and investigating how to do the basic authenication from LMS to BiZX using OAuth Token Server access. My question is, the authenication is established by middleware integration like CPI or Boomi? I can I facilitate the pre-requisties to be performed in the LMS system?

I had a standard KBA from SAP but is shows how to integrate the web services and calls for Learning events. Can i have a basic informtaion in the child stage regarding the authenication?

Thanks for your support.

Many Regards

Moulika

SAP SuccessFactors Learning API

entry.title: Re: Extract ECC
entry.content: ODBC connection to the database

entry.title: Re: Mass Creattion of Sub-WBS element
entry.content:
Yes, there is!
It is possible to perform mass creation of projects and/or WBS elements using tcode CNMASSCREATE.

The first step is to access the tcode and download the template by clicking the "Download CREATE Template" button. The file has four tabs.

In your case, since you only want to create WBS elements, fill in only the second tab of the spreadsheet, which refers to WBS elements, and leave the first tab, related to project definitions, blank.

Regards
Marcio Blos

entry.title: Re: Tabela-Campo Chave de Acesso NF-e Saída / Table-Field...
entry.content:
Bom dia.

Pessoal, consegui, precisa concatenar os campos da tabela J_1BNFE_ACTIVE, conforme tabela abaixo, os quais geram a chave de acesso.

Obrigado.

=====================================================

Good morning.

I managed to do it, you need to concatenate the fields of the J_1BNFE_ACTIVE table, as shown in the table below, which generate the access key.

Thank you.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

  
REGIORegion of Document IssuerJ_1BREGIO CHAR 20 
NFYEARYear of Document DateJ_1BYEAR CHAR 20 
NFMONTHMonth of Document DateJ_1BMONTH CHAR 20 
STCD1CNPJ Number of Document IssuerJ_1BSTCD1 CHAR 140 
MODELModel of Nota FiscalJ_1BMODEL NUMC 20 
SERIESeriesJ_1BSERIES CHAR 30 
NFNUM9Nine-Digit Document NumberJ_1BNFNUM9 CHAR 90 
DOCNUM9Random Number in Access KeyJ_1BDOCNUM9 CHAR 90 
CDVCheck Digit in Access KeyJ_1BCHECKDIGIT CHAR 10

entry.title: Web Client Extension Error 404 - React App with React Router
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm trying to add tile extension to SAP B1 WebClient written in React.JS and it worked unless I added React Router functionality to it.

Now main page displays an error of 404. It is the problem with the address of a page, but I can't find a solution how to solve that. I added the 'homepage' tag as '.' to package.json like docs says but it didn't help.

If anyone knows the answer, please let me know. Thanks.

entry.title: Master Data Integration Internal Server Error with Instance Creation Failed
entry.content:
Hi
When I try to create an instance on BTP subaccount with plan, sap-integration I get Creation Failed with Internal Server Error.
It is for to sync with Subscription Billing.

I can create an instance on other subaccounts within the same Global account.

JSON is:

{
    "businessSystemId": "hrc-sub-bill-utilities",
    "enableTenantDeletion": true,
    "application": "hrc",
    "writePermissions": [{
            "entityType": "sap.odm.businesspartner.BusinessPartner"
        }, {
            "entityType": "sap.odm.product.Product"
        }, {
            "entityType": "sap.odm.finance.ExchangeRate"
        }
    ]
}

Any ideas? Appreciate any help.

Ger

entry.title: Monitor material coverage app not showing requirements as shortage
entry.content:
Dependent requirements are not showing in Monitor material shortage app under respective Shortage definition. Any Reason?

Here its mentioned that dependent reservation will show under stock day supply. OSDM1

Demand Profiles - OSDM0

MD04 screen

Monitor material coverage app shows nothing

But manage material coverage app shows the data

I am expecting this requriements should be shown as shortage in Monitor material coverage app. Is my understanding wrong?

entry.title: SAPPhire Orlando 2025: How agentic AI revolutionizes the way SAP is running support
entry.content:
My Session: How agentic AI revolutionizes the way SAP is running support, May 20, 2025 11:30 AM-11:50 AM EDT Session ID DIS1727

What you will learn about: In this session we will showcase how we’ve designed our first code based agentic scenario for customer support. We will showcase the business problem, the use case design as well as a short demo.

Looking forward to seeing you: I’m looking forward to seeing you to share with you our thoughts on a flexible and scalable architecture, a demo of the scenario as well as sharing lessons learned so far.

Now let’s hear from you - please feel free to share your thoughts/expectations/insights in the comments! 🚀

Nina

entry.title: Re: Updation of CDHDR table
entry.content: Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Usage decision is not possible as Purchase order is a...
entry.content:
Hello @AV1976 

I don't think there is a good solution in your situation. I wonder how you managed to get yourself into such a trouble in the first place? How was it possible to archive and delete purchase orders with pending usage decisions? That looks like a huge gap that needs to be closed.

The MM_EKKO archiving object doesn't provide a reload program, at least not in standard. So you can't reload the missing purchase orders. 

The message M7150 comes from several places in the VBWS_CORRECTION_EKBE function module, which in turn is called from the VBWS_BATCH_VALUATION_CHANGE_UD function:

which in turn is called from the QMSP_VALUATE_CHARACTERISTIC function:

As far as I understand, the functions update batch classification during usage decision posting. You might try to clear e_post_classification under debugger, which would skip the update and error message. That won't update batch classification, but might allow to post the usage decision. Then you would need to verify batch classification. Those are just lose suggestions, not a ready-made solution. You need to test that thoroughly and verify all side effects. 

I'd also suggest contacting SAP support. They might have a better idea.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: /DMO/FLIGHT maintain data public cloud system
entry.content: SAPBC_DATA_GENERATOR is for the old table SFLIGHT, not for the recent /DMO/FLIGHT. Run the class /dmo/cl_flight_data_generator.

entry.title: SAP VIM Available services/API: OTBCINB/PF01_REGIST_DOC - API for document registration
entry.content:
Hi,

I have found the information bellow:

API for document registration
Starting with version 16.3.2, Business Center provides an API for the registration of
documents. This allows the start of Business Center processes from none-SAP
systems.
Available services:
• /OTBCINB/PF01_REGIST_DOC

 

Please, I have not found this API. 

Anyone knows how to access this API?

What kind of API is this? ODATA? Web Service(SOAMANGER) ?

 

Thanks for your help!!

 

Best Regards,

Delano.

entry.title: Visibility of Recruiting Applicants in Manage Pending Hires
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm currently implementing Recruiting integrated with Employee Central.

In the transformation template, we have the Target Role defined with R. The Recruiters don’t have permission to Manage Pending Hires (as per customer requirement).

In customer scenario, the users responsible for hiring the new employees (that have access to Manage Pending Hires) are not defined in Job Requisition, since they have no task in the recruitment process. These users have Manage Pending Hires permission, and the Recruiter is included in their target population, but for some reason, they are not able to see any candidates in Manage Pending Hires from Recruiting. 

 

Any idea on what might be missing?

Thanks in advance,

Anyone knows how to access this API?

What kind of API is this? ODATA? Web Service(SOAMANGER) ?


Thanks for your help!!

 

Best Regards,

Delano.

entry.title: The Future Deposit, Return and Return Systems in Spain (SDDR)
entry.content:
Introduction

The Ministry of Ecological Transition and Demographic Challenge in Spain (MITECO) defines the circular economy as a model in which the products, materials and resources are maintained in use as long as possible and the waste generation is minimised as much as possible.

The current economic model is a linear model, based on “take-manufacture-consume-dispose”, which is:

  • Aggressive with the environment and will deplete sources of supply, both material and energy.
  • There is a strong dependency on raw materials, leading to associated supply risk, high commodity prices and high volatility
  • Significant reduction in natural capital and economic losses.

The Spanish Circular Economy Strategy for 2030 defined by the MITECO, contributes to Spain's efforts to achieve a sustainable, decarbonised, resource-efficient and competitive circular economy.

 

Challenges for 2023

According to the “Report on the calculation of separated collection of single use plastic bottles for beverages during 2023” published by the MITECO, the percentage of separated collection of SUP bottles in Spain for the year 2023 is 41.3%:

  • Total Single-use plastic bottles (SUP) placed on the domestic market amount to 214.039 tons
  • The estimated total of SUP bottles collected separately by the Local Authorities amounts to 74.482 tons
  • The estimated total of SUP bottles collected through private/complementary collections amounts to 14.017 tons

The Circular Economy Law (7/2022)  defined the expectation of 70% in the separated collection of single use plastic bottles by 2023, via SCRAP (Collective EPR Systems) such as Ecoembes and others.

Since the 70% goal was not reached (only 41.3% was achieved), the law defines the obligation to establish an SDDR system for single-use plastic bottles in a 3 year's timeframe. The deadline for this will be by November 2026.

 

Deposit, Return and Refund

In summary, the Deposit, Return and Refund Systems (or SDDR in Spanish for "Sistemas de Deposito, Devolución y Retorno") is a mechanism to manage used packaging, by which, the consumer will be charged with an extra price (deposit) when buying the bottles. This deposit will be refunded when the empty bottle is returned in the corresponding recycling points.

This mechanism was regulated in the Packaging Law (Royal Decree 1055/2022) for reusable packaging only. According to the art. 45.4 of the Packaging Law 1055/2022, the expected business flow is the following:

  • Each EPR collective system (such as Ecoembes, Ecovidrio,…) will establish a deposit fee for the packaging (with a minimum of 10 cents).
  • The Packer companies (Producers of Products) have to pay the initial deposit upfront to the EPR collective system.
  • The Packer companies shall charge the deposit to the Sales channel (for example, supermarkets)
  • The Sales channel shall pay the deposit to the Packer company and will transfer it to the buyers.
  • The buyers will recover the deposit by returning the empty bottles in the supermarket recycling point.
  • The supermarket will refund the deposit to the buyer, normally not in cash, but via discounts. At this point in time, the supermarket has paid the deposit twice: first to the Packer Company, and second to the consumer via discounts.
  • The supermarket will “bill” the EPR collective system for the amount of deposits refunded, and will deliver the collected empty bottles.
  • The EPR collective system will refund the corresponding amounts to the supermarket.

 

VAT implications

According to the binding replies V1373-24 and V0362-16 by the Directorate of Taxes in Spain:

  • The deposit amount has to be explicitly stated in the invoice.
  • The VAT tax base amount shall include the SUP plastic bottle deposit amount (therefore, the deposit amount is subject to VAT).
  • When the SUP plastic bottle is returned in the recyling point, a reduction of the  original tax base amount will take place (article 80 of the VAT Law). This will be documented by means of a correction invoice.

 

Open questions

The Packaging and Packaging waste regulation 2025/40 (PPWR), published on 19 December 2024 and effective as of February 2025, establishes a new European regulatory framework for packaging and packaging waste.  This regulation replaces Directive 2018/852 (PPWD, Packaging and Packaging waste directive).

The PPWR regulates that "by 1 January 2029, Member States shall take the necessary measures to ensure the separate collection of at least 90 % per year by weight of the following packaging formats made available on the market for the first time in that Member State in a given calendar year:

  • single-use plastic beverage bottles with a capacity of up to three litres; and
  • single-use metal beverage containers with a capacity of up to three litres"

In Spain, this PPWR regulation might impact the Packaging Law 1055/2022, so it is expected to have adjustments during 2025 and /or 2026. Until these adjustments are published by MITECO,  currently there are a number of open questions, such as:

  • Will a special reporting be needed for the SDDR fees, such as extensions of the Annex VI?
  • Will there be new invoicing requirements for the Producer of Products related to the SDDR fee?

Unfortunately, we still need to wait till the law adjustments are published to solve these questions.

 

References

  • “Circular Economy” portal (Ministry of Ecological Transition and Demographic Challenge)
  • Spain Circular 2030
  • Royal Decree 1055/2022 on Packaging and packaging wastes.
  • Law 7/2022 on Wastes and contaminated soils for a Circular Economy
  • Packaging and Packaging waste regulation 2025/40 (PPWR),
  • Feasibility analysis for the establishment of an SDDR system in Spain (2021)
  • Report for SUP separated collection in 2022 by MITECO
  • Report for SUP separated collection in 2023 by MITECO
  • SAP links for points of Sale.
    • Bottle Deposit and Empty Bottle Return Configuration (SAP PoS)
    • Deposit-charged Products "Pfand"
    • Webinar Recording & Questions: What’s new in 2.0 FP15

 

DISCLAIMER. 

The links in the blog are external, so they may be modified at any time externally without previous notice.

This blog is meant for legal information purposes. It does not define any commitment to develop or deliver any of the functionality mentioned above.

entry.title: S4HANA 1909 to 2303 upgrade - SAP FI-CA new functionnalities
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We're currently planning an S4/Hana upgrade from version 1909 to version 2303.

For this purpose, I'm trying to find à list of new functionnalities cocnerning the FI-CA module but I cannot find à sort of list, I may search in the wrong way.

Can you please help me find some ressources ?

Thanks for your time.

entry.title: Re: Third Party Order processing in case of multiple vendors
entry.content: You can use Quota arrangements to switch between supplier automatically

entry.title: Re: Tab vs Drop Down Option to List Pages in a Story
entry.content:
Hi @mz_geekie , @mfoeken @TuncayKaraca @DebjitSingha ,
You can follow below steps to enable Tab Bar option as default view option in SAC Optimized view mode. 

  1. Option 'Left Panel'
  2. Go to 'Outline' > 'Global Settings' > 'Navigation'
  3. Enable the toggle "Override default Settings " and Click Done.
  4. Save the Story. 

PFA the Snapshot for your reference.

entry.title: Safety stock issue due to supplier delay
entry.content:
Hello experts, 

Currently we have set up master data with proper safety stock, reorder point, planned delivery time for our business scenario. MRP triggers purchase requisition if there is any shortfall. 

The problem is supplier does not fullfil the demand on time (there are cases delay with one or two months of time period).

To tackle this currently we are storing three months of addition inventory in stock (in addition to safety stock).

Is there a better approach or better planning process we can handle this situation?

 

Thanks 

Varatha

entry.title: Cancelamento do processo de STO
entry.content:
Bom dia!
No processo de cancelamento de uma STO (Transferência entre plantas da mesma empresa não está contabilizando os impostos: 
1) Movimento 862:
Lançamentos: ProdAcab: R$ 188-, ProdAcab R$ 325+ IR Transferência Mat R$ 137-; ICM A REC R$ 12,72 ; ICMS A RECOLHER R$ 12,72.
2) Movimento 861: 
Lançamentos: ProdAcab: R$ 188; ProdAcab R$ 325-;IR Transferência Mat R$ 137; 

Alguem pode ajudar ?

entry.title: Re: SAP Community Escape House for May - ABAP Cloud
entry.content: @sheenamk Interesting set of challenges.

entry.title: SAP Sapphire Orlando 2025: Powering process-centric, agentic AI strategies with SAP Signavio
entry.content:
Hi, I'm Noor, Director Product Management at SAP, a data and AI enthusiast, focused on helping businesses leverage SAP Signavio to drive process excellence. I'm excited to share how we're bringing the power of AI to process transformation at Sapphire this year.

My Session:

Are you ready to unlock the next level of business process transformation with AI? Join us at SAP Sapphire for a dynamic 20-minute session, “Powering Process-Centric, Agentic AI Strategies with SAP Signavio".

  • Session Date and Time: 2:00 PM - 2:20 PM EDT
  • Session ID: BTM1724

Agentic AI is on the rise, but how can you fully capitalize on the potential of AI agents? Join us in this session as we explore how SAP Signavio can help you define and scale your agentic AI strategy. You will learn how SAP Signavio enables you to Identify optimal points in your processes for AI agent implementation, operate agents based on precise insights, as well as monitor their impact and ensure governance. 

Don't miss this opportunity to understand how SAP Signavio can streamline your journey towards effective agentic AI adoption: 

  • Discover Opportunities: Identify where AI agents can deliver the greatest efficiency gains within your organization. 
  • Streamline Execution: Learn how to effectively run AI agents leveraging insights generated by SAP Signavio solutions. 
  • Monitor and Optimize: Track and ensure that AI agents are delivering the expected value to your processes and business 
  • Ensure Governance: Maintain AI compliance with your business strategy and regulatory requirements. 

Over the session, we will also discuss how AI Agents assist key roles, accelerating time to value and improving business agility. Curious to see how process modelers, analysts, transformation champions and business roles can leverage AI agents to assist them in their jobs?  Join us at Sapphire Orlando 2025 and learn more. 

Why You Should Attend: 

This session will provide you with actionable insights and practical examples of how you can leverage AI Agents to drive process transformation in your organization. You’ll learn how to: 

  • Identify opportunities to leverage AI Agents within your process landscape. 
  • Empower different user roles with tailored AI-driven solutions. 
  • Ensure your AI initiatives are compliant and aligned with your business strategy. 
  • Accelerate time to value and improve overall business agility. 

Don't miss this opportunity to discover how SAP Signavio is shaping the future of AI Agents and AI Agents are shaping the future of business process management!    

Other related sessions I recommend:  

Unlock the future: AI-enabled process mining with SAP Signavio at Mondi - BTM3073

Built for the future: How to develop a transformation capability - BTM1723

AI agent governance: Your system of record to boost visibility and impact - BTM3069

Crafting the future: The SAP Signavio solutions 2025 road map - BTM1720

Process optimization opportunities with SAP Signavio and WalkMe solutions - BTM3074

SAP Signavio solutions road map: Enhancements to the integrated tool chain - BTM2880

Embark on a successful transformation journey to SAP Business Suite - ERP3230

 

Related community topic pages: 

SAP Signavio

SAP Business AI

Now I would like to hear from you:  

  • How are you currently leveraging AI agents to increase your process efficiency?
  • What are the current challenges you face when building your AI strategy?

Tell us in the comments, and we look forward to seeing you in Orlando in a few weeks!

entry.title: Re: Demand Driven MRP (DDMRP)：Create consumption data que...
entry.content: @lannew - Hi Lance, coming back to your question. This is a tricky one and we have to look internally if we cannot provide a better solution as the historical GI data is not available in the sense you need it. What you could try is to use extension point Buffer Level Zone Update (DD_BUFFERLEVELZONE) to see if you can extent and put the GI info there? Br, Markus

entry.title: Can Screens be customized in IAS?
entry.content: Specifically the User Profile Screen.

entry.title: Re: Types of confirmation of production order
entry.content: CO15, CO11, CO11N, CO12, CO19, COHV

entry.title: Re: Joule – Getting Started with Document Grounding - setup guide
entry.content: Hello, please consider that, in step "d. Create Destination in SAP BTP Subaccount", when using OAuth2ClientCrendentials authentication, you should use the Sharepoint URL (e.g. https://xxxx.sharepoint.com/sites/YYYYY) instead of https://graph.microsoft.com .

entry.title: Purging data in SAP BW4HANA
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

1. Can we directly delete the data from cold tier by using DELETED option in RSOADSODTO and to clear physically data , clean up option in cockpit view.

2. how to  purge the data in ADSO which doesnot have time char ( TD) as part of compliance.

Request you to share your expertise .

entry.title: Indirect Tariffs as a condition on Supplier Purchasing Docs (US related)
entry.content:
Due to the ongoing Tariff topic in the U.S., our suppliers are discussing passing along their tariff costs to us as a surcharge.  We are currently on ECC6.0, EHP6. We have added a new condition type to handle this, but we also have many suppliers on ERS (Automotive) and the ERS processor doesn't pick up the condition costs to include on the invoice after Goods Receipt of same.  To make it more complex, we have other conditions (for example freight) which should not be included on the vendor's ERS invoice, as it is invoiced by a freight supplier separately.

Example:

Purchase order for Qty 10 @ $10/ea

Condition 1 - tariff surcharge @ 10%

Condition 2 - freight @ 5%

Goods receipt accounting document 

Inventory $115

GRIR materials ($100)

GRIR Tariff -($10)

GRIR Freight ($5)

Desired ERS Vendor Invoice 

Vendor ($110)

GRIR Materials $100

GRIR Tariff $10

What we get

Vendor ($100)

GRIR Materials $100

Are any other companies running into this situation?  How are you handling?

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere Catalog and Data Marketplace Convergence
entry.content:
Has the documentation at Governing and Publishing Data in the Catalog | SAP Help Portal been updated to reflect this convergence?

If not yet, when - approximately - will the doc follow the 2025.05 release being published?

entry.title: Comments on Custom Object not in print out - Latest Form Experience
entry.content:
Hi,

After turning on Latest Form Experience in Performance Management Feature settings we notice that some comment field are missing when the form is printed.

In the release item it says that comments for goals are not printed - but actually they are,

The issue is with comments on a custom type field - these are not printed.

Is this a known issue?

Kind regards,

Monique

entry.title: Set up Ariba Buying base edition with S4 public Cloud TDD
entry.content:
Hello, 

 

We are trying to set up Ariba Buying base edition with our S4 TDD and we encountered some difficulties:

We can't integrate any suppliers catalogues as it is for our demo system , is there any test suppliers catalogues that we could use ?

We tried to test the process by requesting a unlisted item but the purchase request is stuck in ``Awaiting approval`` status with the message :  unable to display the content workflowinstance not found .

We didn't touch the Automatic Approval Variant so the Preq should be approved automatically.

I couldn't find anything in the documentation regarding this error, any ideas ?

Thanks 

Caroline

entry.title: Re: Prevent Autofocus on sap.ui.unified.calendar
entry.content: @ future readers: this sounds like an enhancement request or a bug. Please go ahead and create an issue at https://github.com/SAP/openui5/issues if the issue is still reproducible.

entry.title: Re: WFA on HANA supervisior dimension older configuration...
entry.content:
@YSE-1I deleted the unmapped values however if i click save afterwards in edit hierarchies, The UI becomes stuck in a loading/saving loop for a long time(10+ minutes.. and exiting afterwards makes WFA on HANA data Factory inaccessible so I have to close browser and wait a bit) with nothing happening. If I log out and back in the data comes back so deleting and trying to save afterwards so I can rerun initial build does not work since its not applying the delete and saving. That and the result of Manager ID with none Dimension should have returned 100s of single ids, however it just has the old hierarchy and like 7 ids in unmapped so its not even returning correct result for current dimension + result from old query. 

Edit: I have deleted and waited forever for it to try to finish, finally I got a popup (The current function cannot be completed because of a network issue). I tried again and same result. I'm unable to remove that hierachy from unmapped.

entry.title: Re: How to resolve "backend error occurred" in SAP GUI for HTML (WebGUI)
entry.content:
I have a problem, where in the action to attach file , happens a error below, the incident ocurr of way intermitent.

Backend error occurred
Please contact your system administrator.
Backend Error Details

Received "control not found" on batch step #1:
{"post":"action/402/wnd[0]/shellcont/shell/shellcont[0]/shell"}
ID: 785069
The complete batch was:
1: ("post":"action/402/wnd[0]/shellcont/shell/shellcont[0]/shell"}
2: ["post":"okcode/ses[0]","content":"=OK"}
3: {"post":"vkey/0/ses[0]}
4: ["get":"state/ur"]

The step by step is access ME22N, click in "More", "Objects Service", " Create", "Create Attach" and after choose any file and to click in OK.

Anybody, can help me with this case. My client have in the moment a version 785 Kernel.

entry.title: Re: How to turn off all notifications in the Compensation module
entry.content:
Hi @Olskar 

Only template by template. 

All the best,

Xavier

entry.title: Re: MRM Blog 3: Configuring Exchange Rate Updates in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,
are the only data sources BYOR (for bring your own rates data option) or ST (for Refinitiv data option)?
How can other data sources, such as ECB, be used if the Refinitiv data option was licensed?

Best regards,

Leon

entry.title: Asset Acquisition (GL TO FA) - Multiple change set
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

In Asset Acquisition multiple change set IDs are not being created, and all requests are going under the same batch. Kindly provide a solution to this.

Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: Re: My workflow for installing a new eclipse version (with AdT) - Eclipse 2020-06
entry.content:
I shoul add 10.1: Map ctrl+p to "Navigate to problems-view tab .

(See: https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-and-automation-blog-posts/how-to-use-adt-solely-with-a-keyboard-gt-navigation-in-eclipse/ba-p/13407488 )

check https://help.sap.com/docs/connectivity/sap-btp-connectivity-cf/upgrade#avoid-connectivity-downtime for the description of the upgrade process of an HA setup

Markus

entry.title: Re: Cash Mgm: how exclude FOC Sales Order flow
entry.content:
Hi,

Hello, I found this note I found this note ..."180177 - FSD: SD orders relavnce for cash managmnt&forecast...according to this ..."There is no option for setting the cash management and forecast relevency for specific sales document types or item categories.Only billing-relevance of the item category (field VBAP-FKREL) )."...  It means that should be handled by SD customization.

Att

RL

entry.title: Re: Object Store Referece: Failed to update the instance ....not allowed to change the plan of refer
entry.content: Afraid not. We put a workaround which is to create the instance manually in BTP and then set the mta for "existing-service"

entry.title: how user group is created automatically in SQ03
entry.content:
Hi All

There is a new user who joined company for whom we are trying to create user groups in transaction SQ03 which should start from SYSTQ and system is not allowing to create user group starting from SYSTQ

Can you please let us know how and where to create user group in SQ03

Note: system allow prefix but we wanted to know how system created user group for other users starting with SYSTQ in SQ03

Please respond as it is urgent requirement to create for new user

Regards

Jithendra Shivashankar

entry.title: Re: Selective Data Transfer to SAP Cloud ALM: Why It Matters and How to Approach It

If you are not registered, please use this link to do so: SAP Learning Hub. FYI - it may take a little longer than normal to receive an activation/verification email - we are in the process of a platform change.

We look forward to seeing you!

entry.title: Re: JDBC Adapter Fails to Parse Scalar Response from Stor...
entry.content: Yes, you are right, I need to follow up with the application owner to which the DB belongs and has to get it done. Thanks Ryan for your time. I appreciate it.

entry.title: Re: Disable Automatic Clearing in EBS
entry.content: Thanks

entry.title: Pass empty or encoded values in SET_FORM_FIELD using application/x-www-form-urlencoded in ABAP
entry.content:
I'm working with an ABAP program that sends an HTTP POST request using application/x-www-form-urlencoded content type via CL_HTTP_CLIENT. The API expects a payload like this:

I cannot use SET_CDATA, so I have to use SET_FORM_FIELD. Here's what I'm trying:

{
"amount_to_capture": "50000",
"final_capture": "false",
"amount_details": {
"line_items": ""
}
}

 

ABAP
lo_http_client->request->set_method( 'POST' ). lo_http_client->request->set_header_field( name = 'Content-Type' value = 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded' ). lo_http_client->request->suppress_form_fields_in_body( abap_false ).
lo_http_client->request->set_form_field( name = 'amount_to_capture' value = '50000' ). lo_http_client->request->set_form_field( name = 'final_capture' value = 'false' ). lo_http_client->request->set_form_field( name = 'amount_details[line_items]' value = '' ).

But the last field (line_items) is not sent at all when the value is empty (''), which causes the API to reject the request.

Even trying with a space or URL-encoded value like %20 didn't always behave consistently:

 

abap
 
lo_http_client->request->set_form_field( name = 'amount_details[line_items]' value = '%20' ).

How can I force ABAP to send an empty or hex-encoded value using SET_FORM_FIELD in a way that it is included in the request body?

Is there a known workaround for forcing ABAP to include fields with empty values when sending x-www-form-urlencoded content?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: CDS Projection View parameters not allowed
entry.content: Hi, same situation here, I still cannot understand how to use projection views for OData service consumption. If exposed as a query, only inA service are available (so not possible to consume them in Fiori apps Analytical List Report). What's the point of projection view then ?

entry.title: Cash Discount to customer
entry.content:
Hi,

While practicing SAP FICO in EH6, practice server, i am not getting the discount directly.

Either i have to change the 1st line item after simulating or in the first line entry posting iteslf i add the dicounted ammount. 

Are these the right ways or does the system geneterate automatically and the assigned amout shows 0?

#SAP SAP Help Portal

entry.content: @EVThomasDid you get a solution to this issue?

entry.title: Re: Reporting accurately in Latest Goal Management
entry.content: Did you find a solution to this issue?

entry.title: Re: Learning Path for SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content: @Joh28 Thank you so much for the support Joh! I am glad that this is helpful for you.

entry.title: Unable to change payment terms for invoice
entry.content:
Hi SAP community, 

One of our user is currently trying to change the payment terms on an invoice but they are receiving the following error: 


Payment reference 86342136 is incorrect for Finland.
Message No: F0494

Diagnosis: 
There is a check routine defined in the system for country FI. When this routine was used for country 86342136, it found an error. 
The error may be the result of an incorrect check digit. Other causes may be incorrect field length(the number is too great or the value too short) or the use of a character which is not permitted(an alphanumeric value in a numeric field, for example)

Procedure: 
Check whether the number was transferred correctly from the original document. 

Effects on customizing: 
You can define when this system message is to be issued in accordance with your requirements.
You do this in customizing as follows: Cross-Application components - Bank directory - Change message control
The application area and message number can be taken from the technical documentation.

Kindly help on how to resolve this issue.

entry.title: Re: WalkMe Now Available in SAP SuccessFactors : A New Era of Digital Adoption
entry.content: What are the prerequisites to have the "Understand your compensation" walk-through appear for end-users?  We can't get it to show for our population.

entry.title: Re: Can the SAP connector extract data from an ADSO to MS...
entry.content:
Well, the answer is probably "no".

The .NET Connector can only be used to call RFC-enabled function modules in an SAP ABAP system (like NetWeaver, ECC, R/3, S/4, Business Warehouse, etc.) It can neither connect to "ADSO", nor to Power BI.

entry.title: Re: Safety stock issue due to supplier delay
entry.content: Here you need to take into consideration why the vendor is not able to deliver the products as committed.  If the vendor dont have proper planning or capacity to produce the ordered components, then, your client has to reconsider to go with an alternate vendor who can supply on time.  Of course, the realistic delays can be addressed with some work arounds but not for the vendor's inability to supply

entry.title: Re: Unable to debug Third Party ALES Process flow in SM58
entry.content: Probably, it would have been nice had you explained what the issue is and why you were trying debug mode

Não perca esta oportunidade única! Certifique-se de se inscrever pelo link antes que as vagas se esgotem.

entry.title: Navigating the Tariffs Jungle: How SAP IBP Empowers Resilience in an Uncertain World
entry.content:
In today’s dynamic global marketplace, marked by an unpredictable tariff landscape and unprecedented supply chain disruptions, companies cannot afford to rely solely on yesterday’s playbook. The recent U.S. tariff regime—characterized by sweeping measures such as a 10% duty on all imported goods, dramatic reciprocal tariffs reaching up to 50% on certain countries, and even staggering rates for pivotal markets like China—has redefined the rules of international trade. With effective tariff rates soaring to unprecedented levels, supply chain leaders face persistent uncertainty and escalating costs. In such a challenging environment, the imperative is clear: build resilience that not only absorbs shocks but transforms risk into a competitive advantage. This is where SAP Integrated Business Planning (IBP), backed by seamless integration to supply chain execution systems, steps in as a game-changing solution.

Supply Chain Visibility

SAP Integrated Business Planning isn’t just about managing data across the supply chain—it’s a holistic approach that integrates commercial, strategic, operational, and digital resilience into your decision-making process. When tariffs surge unpredictably, the effectiveness of your supply chain planning can mean the difference between merely surviving turbulent times and thriving despite adversity. With SAP IBP, companies gain real-time insights, scenario-driven analytics, and the flexibility to dynamically adjust their strategies to mitigate the impact of tariffs and shifting market conditions.

At the heart of SAP IBP is its robust scenario planning capability—just what’s needed in a world where three potential futures loom large: pragmatic de-escalation with moderated tariffs, a “holding the line” scenario that keeps rates high to pressure trading partners, or a disorderly escalation spiralling into broader economic turmoil. The platform enables organizations to simulate varying scenarios and assess their potential impact on cost structures, supply networks, and market demand—offering a crystal ball of insights that empower proactive planning rather than reactionary adjustments. By incorporating forecasting models and what-if analysis, SAP IBP ensures that your supply chain strategy remains agile as policies shift and the economic landscape transforms.

One of the key advantages of SAP IBP is its capacity to integrate data and processes across the entire supply chain, creating a unified view that connects sourcing, production, inventory, and logistics. Tariff changes can abruptly alter the financial and operational calculus of global trade—from impacting raw material costs in the production phase to the bottom line after goods transit borders. With SAP IBP, decision-makers can swiftly pinpoint which segments of their operations are most vulnerable to tariff volatility and reallocate resources, diversify suppliers, or even consider nearshoring alternatives to mitigate risk. This seamless integration not only translates into real-time cost tracking but also equips companies with the intelligence needed to adjust procurement and logistics strategies on the fly.

In tandem with these operational advantages, SAP IBP also reinforces commercial resilience. As tariff-induced cost pressures ripple through markets, consumer behavior and demand patterns are bound to evolve—often unpredictably. The predictive analytics built into SAP IBP allow organizations to capture subtle market shifts and forecast changes in consumer demand. Armed with these insights, companies can recalibrate pricing strategies, tailor product assortments, and reassess channel strategies to maintain competitive positioning despite higher costs. In essence, SAP IBP helps businesses not only navigate the immediate pitfalls of tariff hikes but also capitalize on emerging opportunities in a disrupted market.

Digital resilience is another cornerstone of SAP IBP. In today’s fast-paced environment, manual planning and outdated legacy systems simply can’t keep pace with the velocity of change. SAP IBP leverages advanced AI algorithms and real-time data monitoring to provide an agile platform where automated adjustments are the norm rather than the exception. This digital backbone ensures that the supply chain remains not only responsive to sudden policy shifts but also continuously optimized for efficiency. Enhanced transparency across business networks means that every stakeholder—from procurement managers to financial executives—can access timely, relevant data to inform strategic decisions, thereby reducing the lag between market disruption and adaptive response.

The current tariff landscape is a clarion call for strategic investment in resilient, integrated planning solutions. One of the major innovations that comes into picture is characteristics or attribute-based planning with SAP IBP. With attribute-based planning, each supply element can be tagged with its country of origin, and each demand with its destination-specific trade rules. Now, instead of a one-size-fits-all production and sourcing strategy, the planning system intelligently segments manufacturing and procurement based on these attributes. Planning and execution should go together. SAP S/4HANA Supply and Demand segmentation acts as the glue that ensures there is uninterrupted process flow between the planning in IBP and the execution process from procurement, production, warehousing to final delivery in SAP S/4HANA.

Finally, tariff fluctuations can severely disrupt order fulfillment, creating inventory imbalances and increasing lead times. SAP S/4HANA Advanced Available-to-Promise (aATP) ensures that companies meet customer expectations by intelligently managing product availability across a complex, multi-tiered supply network. By leveraging real-time data and demand-driven allocation, aATP dynamically adjusts order commitments, prioritizes profitable customers, and reroutes shipments based on tariff changes and capacity constraints.

By embracing SAP Integrated Business Planning coupled with complementing supply chain execution capabilities in S/4HANA, companies position themselves to transform tariff-induced disruption into a catalyst for innovation and improved operational alignment. Rather than being paralyzed by uncertainty, supply chain leaders can harness robust planning tools to create adaptive frameworks that evolve in lockstep with the challenges of global commerce.

Now more than ever, the ability to respond quickly and decisively to external shocks is not merely a luxury—it’s a business imperative. With SAP Integrated Business Planning at the core of your supply chain strategy, you’re empowered to reimagine how your organization navigates not just tariffs, but the vast array of disruptions defining this new normal. In the face of rising tariffs and economic unpredictability, let resilience be your competitive edge and innovation your guiding principle. For further guidance, I recommend to listen to this crisp and very recent podcast: "Transforming Tariff Challenges into Opportunities Through Better Planning with SAP’s Jay Foster and Lori Harner".

entry.title: Bootcamp SAP S/4HANA Cloud | SAP Future Talent | Spanish

Programa SAP Future Talent: ¡Participa en el programa e inicia tu carrera!

¿Sabías que las soluciones SAP atienden 26 sectores y 12 áreas de negocios? ¡Ahora tienes la oportunidad de formar parte de este increíble ecosistema e iniciar una carrera como consultor(a) en el mercado de tecnología e innovación!

Bootcamp Get Started with SAP S/4HANA Cloud - 100% GRATUITO en español!

  • Fechas: 17, 19, 24 y 26 de junio y 1 de julio
  • Total: 5 clases

Inscríbete para participar: Webinar Registration - Zoom

¡No te pierdas esta oportunidad única! Asegúrate de inscribirte en el enlace antes de que se agoten las plazas.

entry.title: Re: Can Screens be customized in IAS?
entry.content: Yes it can be customized.

entry.title: Three new courses for SAP Business One, Web Client are now live on learning.sap.com
entry.content:
This public training, featuring a mix of video tutorials and practical examples, covers comprehensive aspects of the Web client through three distinct courses: 

  • Discovering SAP Business One, Web Client Logistics (TB2000) – learn how to use and personalize the Web client, manage master data and activities, handle the sales and procurement processes, and monitor Inventory Transactions 
  • Utilizing SAP Business One, Web Client Accounting (TB300)- explore, create, and manage various types of journal entries, use journal entry templates and recurring entries, and review and customize the chart of accounts to fit organizational needs. 
  • Implementing Customization Tools and Analytics in SAP Business One, Web Client (TB2900)- integrate Microsoft applications with the Web client, customize user-defined elements (UDF, UDT, UDO and UDV) to tailor the Web client environment to your specific needs. Also, leverage the Web client powerful analytics to enhance visibility on the business performance. 

Pass all the quizzes in each course and receive digital badges to share in social media. 

Questions we received from users and might be useful to the entire community: 

1) Q: I am a consultant working for an SAP Business One partner. Is this training relevant to me? 

A: Yes indeed. The training is at a beginner level for business users and consultants. 

2) Q: I am interested in learning about the Web client but I am not a customer or a partner. Can I take the training too?  

A: Anyone can take these public courses free of charge. If you like to track your progress, complete quizzes and earn a public badge you would also need to register. 

3) Q: What is the difference between these courses and the 'Exploring SAP Business One, Web Client'  learning journey? 

A: With all the great content in FP 2502, the ‘Exploring SAP Business One, Web Client' learning journey was getting too big, so it was split into these three new courses.  

4) Q: I have bookmarked the Exploring SAP Business One, Web Client learning journey. Will this link work? 

A: Yes it will. The URL of the Exploring SAP Business One, Web Client learning journey is now redirected to the Discovering SAP Business One, Web Client Logistics course. 

Join our SAP Business One, Web client experts community today!

entry.title: SAP Sapphire 2025 in Orlando: Discover the Power of GenAI for Enterprise Transformation
entry.content:
The countdown is on for SAP Sapphire 2025, happening May 20–21 in Orlando, and I couldn’t be more excited to share how Generative AI is transforming the enterprise landscape. As Vice President and Chief Product Officer of Generative AI at SAP Business AI, I’ll be leading several key sessions that showcase how AI is enabling faster, smarter, and more efficient SAP implementations.

With experience from leadership roles at Google, Intuit, and LinkedIn, I’ve spent my career helping businesses unlock the value of technology. Now at SAP, I’m focused on delivering reliable, responsible, and relevant AI solutions that help organizations around the world transform how they work. Whether you're a consultant, developer, executive, or technologist, this is your opportunity to hear directly from me about what’s next for intelligent enterprise transformation with SAP and Generative AI.

A couple of words about me:
My name is Natalie Han, PhD, and I’m the Vice President and Chief Product Officer of Generative AI at SAP Business AI.
With a background leading AI and data science teams at Google, Intuit, and LinkedIn, I bring deep experience in enterprise-scale AI innovation. At SAP, I focus on building reliable, responsible, and relevant Generative AI solutions that are reshaping how businesses run. I'm also a Stanford-trained AI researcher and an advocate for ethical AI and advancing women in technology.

Here’s where you can find me at SAP Sapphire:
I’ll be speaking in four sessions across the two day event. I hope you’ll join me for these conversations that dive into how SAP Joule is transforming consulting and development. 

SAP Joule for Consultants: AI-driven project speed - BAI2596 Solution Demo 
Tuesday, May 20 | 1:30 PM – 1:50 PM EDT
Experience how the SAP Joule for Consultants solution transforms SAP project delivery. We look at how AI-enabled guidance helps consultants work faster, optimize processes, and stay aligned with SAP best practices, accelerating your transformation projects.

Enhancing SAP software projects with AI-driven guidance and code generation - BAI3412 Strategy Talk
Tuesday, May 20 | 4:30 PM - 4:50 PM EDT
Discover how the Joule copilot helps developers and consultants increase productivity. Learn how AI-driven guidance accelerates implementations, while code generation in the ABAP programming language automates coding tasks. See how Joule streamlines workflows, reduces manual effort, and supports best practices—helping teams work smarter and faster.

Transforming SAP software implementations with SAP Joule for Consultants - BAI5026v - Customer Success Story
Wednesday, May 21 | 4:30 PM – 4:50 PM CEST 
I’ll be in conversation with Hendrik Florian Thörner, Partner at KPMG, tune in to learn how AI-enabled guidance streamlines implementations, boost consultant productivity, and helps team align to best practices for faster smarter outcomes

Joule Agents: Your questions answered by the experts - BAI2607 
Wednesday, May 21 | 1:00 PM – 1:20 PM EDT 
Join me and Christian Karaschewitz, SAP AI Product Incubation Lead, for a candid Q&A. Bring your questions, we’ll go deep on Joule agents, business value, and adoption strategies. 

 

Why you should attend:
If you're attending SAP Sapphire, don’t miss these sessions. You’ll get: 

  • an insider look at how SAP Joule for Consultants and SAP Joule for Developers are changing the game for consulting and development 
  • real-world stories from partners like KPMG 
  • a clear view into how Generative AI boosts productivity, streamlines SAP implementations, and improves outcomes for businesses 

I’m excited to connect in Orlando and share how we’re making AI not just powerful, but practical and impactful for real enterprise challenges. These sessions are packed with insight, live demos, and real-world results. 

 

Now let’s hear from you:
I'd love to know: What are your top questions about using Generative AI in your SAP projects? Or just for fun, answer this question in the comments:

Question:
If an AI writes a joke and no one laughs, does it update its algorithm or just blame the humans? 😄

Let me know your answer below 👇

entry.title: Re: Users and dates are not being saved in my RAP applica...
entry.content:
@MioYasutake  this is the behavior : 

Do you have a sample of mapping between the CDS View and the persistent table for the date and user fields? Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Empty parameters after saving JSON for binding creati...
entry.content:
Hi, Uwe,

I tried to follow the steps at Integrate SAP LeanIX | SAP Help Portal and also saw what you report -> the parameters appear empty despite adding the scope entries to the Parameter step.

This is working as designed.  You can see details in KBA 3481257 - How to find out the scopes already assigned to an SAP Cloud ALM API Service Instance? -> the steps in the Resolution inform how you can tell what scope entries were maintained in the resultant binding that was created.  So long as you see the maintained values in the output of the steps described there, as I saw, you properly configured this and the scopes are in place.

In case you need further assistance on this, you should log a support case to check.  Provide the downloaded service binding so support can use in with steps in KBA 3481257 to check the contents for you.

Best regards,
Paula

entry.title: How to add an attribute to an structure field for a XML file
entry.content:
Hi,

I´m facing the next problem, I have a structure for a XML transformation that works ok, but I need to add "attributes" in some fields, for example:

<ExtraInfoDoc name="CondicionVentaOtros">Content for ExtraInfoDoc field</ExtraInfoDoc>

How can I add the attribute to be displayed in the XML file?

Thanks on advance.

entry.title: Re: Tricentis XScan is failing to scan a page on Microsof...
entry.content: Dear Bruno_E, since an answer was provided to your question, and there has been no other activity on the topic, we have accepted the answer as a solution on your behalf. You can unaccept it anytime if the answer provided was not helpful enough or if you have further questions. Thank you for bringing this question to SAP Community! Best regards, Paula

entry.title: Re: Cloud ALM and SNOW integration - create incident for...
entry.content: Dear Subhra, since an answer was provided to your question, and there has been no other activity on the topic, we have accepted the answer as a solution on your behalf. You can unaccept it anytime if the answer provided was not helpful enough or if you have further questions. Thank you for bringing this question to SAP Community! Best regards, Paula

entry.title: Re: Error Message when deploying from Business Applicatio...
entry.content:
Hi,

This message means that your BTP subaccount or organization has reached its quota limit for routes (used in Cloud Foundry). Routes are essentially mappings between your applications and URLs, and BTP limits how many of these can be created based on your quota settings.

Please check whether you have a quota limit under BTP > Cloud Foundry > Space Quotas :

You can also view existing routes in BTP > Cloud Foundry > Spaces > <your_space> > Routes :

You can extend quotas under Global Account > Entitlements or delete unnecessary routes

entry.title: ppm portfolio item type related date sync
entry.content:
We definded different item types. The requierement is to have different variants of synchronisation of dates related to the Portfolio item type.

We looked through documentation. Checked for Badi. But we could not find a solution. The only idea we have right now is to develop.
